name: ext-mcp-trust
description: Pure trust framework helpers with remote-source validation, lock v2 pinning, semver trust-pack selection, and bundle verification from pinned lock entries.
docs:
MCP trust framework helpers.

Modules:
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_v1
- std.mcp.trust.framework_v1
- std.mcp.trust.framework_v3
- std.mcp.trust.resolve_v1
- std.mcp.trust.fingerprint_v1
- std.mcp.trust.errors_v1
- std.mcp.trust.errors_v2
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_sig_stmt_v1
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_sig_verify_v1
- std.mcp.trust.bundle_lock_v1
- std.mcp.trust.lock_v2
- std.mcp.trust.remote_source_v1
- std.mcp.trust.cache_manifest_v1
- std.mcp.trust.verify_bundle_from_lock_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.registry_index_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.bundle_index_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.pack_index_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.pack_manifest_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.semver_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.semver_range_v1
- std.mcp.trust.registry.resolve_v1
- std.mcp.trust.as_select_v1
